WHAT EACH PAGE DOES FOR SEO
Homepage: Establishes brand and primary service relevance
Service pages: Each one is a standalone rankable asset for a specific search
Location pages: Captures geo-targeted searches in every market served
Proof system: Builds trust signals and supports stronger perceived authority
Contact page: Conversion endpoint with properly structured NAP data
WHAT EACH PAGE DOES FOR CONVERSION
Homepage: Qualifies the visitor and routes them to the right service
Service pages: Answers the buyer's question and captures the lead inline
Location pages: Makes the buyer feel spoken to in their own city
Proof system: Removes doubt before the form submit
Contact page: Removes every barrier from the final action

Client owns all website copy, design, and published assets upon final payment. Third-party plugin licenses, hosting, stock assets, and paid tool subscriptions are billed separately unless explicitly included in scope.

07
THE BUILD PROCESS
AND LAUNCH TIMELINE

Six structured phases from kickoff to launch, built around [CLIENT_NAME]'s [LAUNCH_GOAL]. Every phase has a defined output and a client approval gate before the next begins.

1
Kickoff
Week 1
Access confirmed, brand assets collected, goals and timeline locked
2
Architecture + Content Plan
Weeks 1-2
URL structure, keyword targets per page, redirect map. Content writing begins.
3
Design Approved
Weeks 2-3
Homepage, service template, location template, contact flow approved before build
4
Core Build
Weeks 3-5
All pages built in staging: service, location, proof, nav, forms
5
SEO + Optimization
Weeks 5-6
SEO, speed, final copy review, launch QA
6
Launch
Week [TW]
QA, DNS, go-live, Search Console submitted

Timeline begins after agreement is signed, deposit is received, required access is granted, and core assets are delivered. Delays in approvals, missing assets, or scope changes may shift the launch date.

Week 1
Foundation
Kickoff complete. Access and assets confirmed. Architecture planned.
Weeks 1-2
Architecture + Content
URL structure locked. Keyword targets confirmed per page. Redirect map built. Content writing begins.
Weeks 2-3
Design
Homepage, service template, location template, and contact flow approved.
Weeks 3-5
Build
All pages live in staging. Service pages, location pages, proof system, forms.
Weeks 5-6
SEO + Launch Prep
SEO, speed optimization, final copy review, and launch QA complete.
Week [TW]
Launch
DNS transferred. Go-live. Search Console submitted. Tracking verified.
